title: Inheritance PASS: [107] QA_CORE_SPEC.v1 → [113] QA_OBSTRUCTION_AWARE_PLANNER_CERT.v1
_fixture_purpose: Certifies the kernel inheritance edge for [113], the obstruction-aware planner. [113] is a family_extension of [107] that adds planner-specific failure types (OBSTRUCTION_REF_MISMATCH, OBSTRUCTION_NOT_APPLIED, PRUNE_DECISION_INCONSISTENT) on top of the kernel failure algebra. IC5 fires (child failure algebra is a proper superset). IC6-IC7 skipped (no logging contract or invariant refs in [113] v1).
